articles.title: Free Resources
articles.subtitle: Expert insights on aviation careers and English mastery.

home.subtitle: Cabin crew english training, IELTS coaching and professional interview prep — online, worldwide.
home.programCcDesc: Master airline interviews, grooming, aviation English and industry codes.
home.programIeltsDesc: Achieve your target IELTS score with structured coaching, mock tests and individual tracking.
home.programProDesc: Prepare for interviews in all sectors: CV, personal pitch, trick questions, body language.
home.step1Desc: Browse our programs and find the one that matches your goal.
home.step2Desc: Simple payment by bank transfer or D17.
home.step3Desc: Get immediate access to your space and start with your coach.
home.teaserSubtitle: Invest in your future today. Our offers start from 99 DT / month.
